title: Creamy Brazilian Bowtie Pasta
description: A winey, snappy, lazy-sunday Brazilian dish featuring bowtie pasta, this recipe is perfect for a relaxing day at home, it is also gluten-free-friendly by using gluten-free pasta
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the gluten-free bowtie pasta according to the package instructions
In a large skillet, cook the brazilian sausage over medium-high heat, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks
Add the chopped onion to the skillet and cook until it is translucent
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute
Add the white wine to the skillet and cook until it is almost completely reduced
Stir in the heavy cream and bring the mixture to a simmer
Reduce the heat to low and let the sauce simmer for 5 minutes
Stir in the shredded parmesan cheese until it is melted and the sauce is smooth
Drain the cooked pasta and add it to the skillet, tossing it in the sauce until it is well coated
Season the pasta with salt and pepper to taste
Serve the pasta hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley
